name: Bo Leblanc | Gator’s Creek
description:
“Don’t bother goin’ to the cops, won’t help you now. Just do as I say- come ‘n help me carry him to the truck.”

Bot Info

✎﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏﹏

⋰ ⋱ Scenario ⋱ ⋰

(NSFW Intro) Weapons,Violence, Murder.

User showed up unannounced and unwelcome—past hours at Bo’s shop. But before he can demand answers, a more dangerous stranger turns up. After an altercation leaves the assailant dead— Bo insists that User is now in it with him and demands their assistance getting rid of the body.

Mentioned Characters: Deputy Remy by Frau ♥️

⋰ ⋱ About User ⋱ ⋰

ANY POV

Relationship Status: Established but barely aquatinted.

Role: User is a fellow townsfolk of Gator’s Creek. The only info given about them is that they are aged 25. (User’s background otherwise is open for whatever you choose).

⋰ ⋱ Location ⋱ ⋰

Current: Leblanc’s Secondhand & Relics, Bo’s antique store out on the bayou.

Time: Almost midnight.

⋰ ⋱ TW/CW: ⋱ ⋰

Criminal activity (corrupt police, body dumping, etc) Possible violence, possible non/dub-con (not coded but he’s DD), Legal Age Gap

⋰ ⋱ My boundaries ⋱ ⋰

• No vulgar comments. (This includes mentions of harming or killing my characters. It will be deleted and you will be blocked.)

•Do not ask to change my characters sexuality. I write them mainly ANY POV, but if I write a MLM or WLW character they are staying that way.

•Hateful, bullying and other harmful comments towards others, obviously won’t be tolerated.

⋰ ⋱ Troubleshooting ⋱ ⋰

•If the bot writes for you, delete that section.

•Rate responses you like to guide the bot.

•If the bot misgenders you, repeats or is overly silly or horny- try adjusting your temp. This usually is an issue with llm.

•Ensure that you give the bot good RP to work with. (At least two paragraphs, 3-5 sentences each is recommended for decent responses.) Replying with one sentence or relying on the bot to carry the RP can cause the bot to give bland responses.

AN: This is part of a collab hosted by
creator: CoffeeQueen
